ns0:entry.ns0:title: AgentWrapper/agent-orchestrator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AgentWrapper/agent-orchestrator
Language: go
Agent IDE that enables you to manage fleets of coding agents. It comes with an agentic orchestrator that plans tasks, spawns agents, and autonomously handles CI fixes, merge conflicts, and code reviews.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TecharoHQ/anubis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TecharoHQ/anubis
Language: go
Weighs the soul of incoming HTTP requests to stop AI crawlers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asheshgoplani/agent-deck
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asheshgoplani/agent-deck
Language: go
Terminal session manager for AI coding agents. One TUI for Claude, Gemini, OpenCode, Codex, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix
Language: go
DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: go-gitea/gitea
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea
Language: go
Git with a cup of tea! Painless self-hosted all-in-one software development service, including Git hosting, code review, team collaboration, package registry and CI/CD

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/nomad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/nomad
Language: go
Nomad is an easy-to-use, flexible, and performant workload orchestrator that can deploy a mix of microservice, batch, containerized, and non-containerized applications. Nomad is easy to operate and scale and has native Consul and Vault integrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lima-vm/lima
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lima-vm/lima
Language: go
Linux virtual machines, with a focus on running containers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
Language: go
Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/agent-framework-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/agent-framework-go
Language: go
A framework for building, orchestrating and deploying AI agents and multi-agent workflows with support for Go.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mudler/LocalAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mudler/LocalAI
Language: go
LocalAI is the open-source AI engine. Run any model - LLMs, vision, voice, image, video - on any hardware. No GPU required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oapi-codegen/oapi-codegen
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oapi-codegen/oapi-codegen
Language: go
Generate Go client and server boilerplate from OpenAPI 3 specifications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ollama/ollama
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ollama/ollama
Language: go
Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.2, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pocketbase/pocketbase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pocketbase/pocketbase
Language: go
Open Source realtime backend in 1 file

ns0:entry.ns0:title: safing/portmaster
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/safing/portmaster
Language: go
🏔 Love Freedom - ❌ Block Mass Surveillance

ns0:entry.ns0:title: supabase/auth
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/supabase/auth
Language: go
A JWT based API for managing users and issuing JWT tokens

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tphakala/birdnet-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tphakala/birdnet-go
Language: go
Self-hosted realtime soundscape analyser for birds, bats and other wildlife. Multi-model local AI inference, runs 24/7 on a Raspberry Pi.
